match.userMessage:
Handheld camera drifts slowly inward from medium framing toward Scarlett seated at the white vanity, capturing her hand lifting the coral lipstick from its open packaging and turning the bullet deliberately between her fingers to catch the directional window light.
Her soft reflective voiceover line accompanies the slow rotation with minimal mouth movement and focused, unhurried gestures.
Subtle fabric shifts at her wrist and faint dust motes drift in the bright air as the shot tightens on the product.

[SCARLETT, soft reflective]: "One shade. One summer."

Ambient sounds: quiet Bondi studio room tone with soft natural light ambience. soft lipstick case handling, light fingernail trace on matte surface.
